response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the song 'CRAZY'. Used on-screen text to verify lyrics, spelling, and English stylization. The following talk segment features a mix of Indonesian, English, and Japanese; the original spoken language is preserved in 'og' while providing accurate English translations. Discarded unused reference lyrics after the song concluded. Timestamps are strictly synchronized with the vocal audio waveform, ensuring no bleed-over between distinct phrases.

subtitles.original: Perhatian sang putri merak yang tertiup angin,
subtitles.english: Attention, the wind-blown peacock princess,

subtitles.original: aku Pavolia Reine dari hololive ID.
subtitles.english: I'm Pavolia Reine from hololive ID.

subtitles.original: Attention please, I'm Reine from hololive ID Gen 2.
subtitles.english: Attention please, I'm Reine from hololive ID Gen 2.

subtitles.original: 皆様ごきげんよう、わたくしホロライブインドネシア二期生、パヴォリア・レイネと申しますの。
subtitles.english: Good day everyone, I am Pavolia Reine from hololive Indonesia 2nd Gen.

subtitles.original: And welcome to Pavolia Reine's "Peafowl of the Blue Flame"!
subtitles.english: And welcome to Pavolia Reine's "Peafowl of the Blue Flame"!

subtitles.original: Yay! Pavolia Reine's 2025 Birthday! Welcome!
subtitles.english: Yay! Pavolia Reine's 2025 Birthday! Welcome!

subtitles.original: イェーイ、ようこそー！
subtitles.english: Yay, welcome!

subtitles.original: えっと、左上にハッシュタグがありまして...
subtitles.english: Um, there's a hashtag on the upper left corner...

subtitles.original: There's a hashtag on the upper left corner.
subtitles.english: There's a hashtag on the upper left corner.

subtitles.original: It reads #ReineMEPtember2025.
subtitles.english: It reads #ReineMEPtember2025.

subtitles.original: Which is pretty much the same hashtag I've been using for the past few years, yeah?
subtitles.english: Which is pretty much the same hashtag I've been using for the past few years, yeah?

subtitles.original: And if you guys have any thoughts throughout the live, anything...
subtitles.english: And if you guys have any thoughts throughout the live, anything...

subtitles.original: ...you can write it and I'll be looking forward to them.
subtitles.english: ...you can write it and I'll be looking forward to them.

subtitles.original: ご感想、and everything, you guys can write...
subtitles.english: Your thoughts, and everything, you guys can write...

subtitles.original: Campur-campur deh ngomongnya waduh ya gitu deh pokoknya.
subtitles.english: I'm mixing languages, oh well, it's just like that.

subtitles.original: I'm excited to know what you guys think of the live. You don't have to write it now.
subtitles.english: I'm excited to know what you guys think of the live. You don't have to write it now.

subtitles.original: 今じゃなくても大丈夫です。
subtitles.english: It's okay even if it's not right now.

subtitles.original: But I will be waiting! Yes!
subtitles.english: But I will be waiting! Yes!

subtitles.original: So just put any of your thoughts in the hashtag, okay?
subtitles.english: So just put any of your thoughts in the hashtag, okay?

subtitles.original: And next, I want to talk about the concept of the stage.
subtitles.english: And next, I want to talk about the concept of the stage.

subtitles.original: Look at this! It's so cool, right?
subtitles.english: Look at this! It's so cool, right?

subtitles.original: There's mysterious flame, mysterious locks...
subtitles.english: There's mysterious flame, mysterious locks...

subtitles.original: ...mysterious cans, mysterious... where's the liquid?
subtitles.english: ...mysterious cans, mysterious... where's the liquid?

subtitles.original: Well there was like a blue liquid there, but I mean you saw it, right? Yeah.
subtitles.english: Well there was like a blue liquid there, but I mean you saw it, right? Yeah.

subtitles.original: If you, um, I guess if you think of fire or flame, you know...
subtitles.english: If you, um, I guess if you think of fire or flame, you know...

subtitles.original: Usually you guys think of the color red, right? Automatically.
subtitles.english: Usually you guys think of the color red, right? Automatically.

subtitles.original: そうですね、火と言えばですね、赤のイメージが強いかもしれませんが...
subtitles.english: Right, when you think of fire, the image of red might be strong...

subtitles.original: But actually, the blue flame is the strongest. Iya nggasih?
subtitles.english: But actually, the blue flame is the strongest. Right?

subtitles.original: But actually, 実はですね、青い炎が一番強いと思います。
subtitles.english: But actually, I think the blue flame is the strongest.

subtitles.original: Yeah. So that's the theme of today's birthday.
subtitles.english: Yeah. So that's the theme of today's birthday.

subtitles.original: I want to show you guys just how hot a blue flame can be
subtitles.english: I want to show you guys just how hot a blue flame can be

subtitles.original: through hot songs...
subtitles.english: through hot songs...

subtitles.original: ...and songs that will make you feel, adu gerah banget, so atsui, so woo! Gitu deh pokoknya.
subtitles.english: ...and songs that will make you feel, oh it's so hot, so hot, so woo! Like that.

subtitles.original: Just look forward to it, okay?
subtitles.english: Just look forward to it, okay?

subtitles.original: And the songs we've sang today... we have two songs.
subtitles.english: And the songs we've sang today... we have two songs.

subtitles.original: The first one was "Kill Kiss".
subtitles.english: The first one was "Kill Kiss".

subtitles.original: そうですね、すごく好きな曲で、Avec Musique様の「Kill Kiss」です。
subtitles.english: Right, it's a song I really like, "Kill Kiss" by Avec Musique.

subtitles.original: そして2曲目は、私がすごい大好きな...
subtitles.english: And the second song was from a unit I really love...

subtitles.original: ...プロセカのユニット、Vivid BAD SQUAD様の「CRAZY」でした。
subtitles.english: ...the Proseka unit Vivid BAD SQUAD, it was "CRAZY".

subtitles.original: And the second song was "CRAZY" from a unit...
subtitles.english: And the second song was "CRAZY" from a unit...

subtitles.original: ...I really really like from Proseka, by Vivid BAD SQUAD.
subtitles.english: ...I really really like from Proseka, by Vivid BAD SQUAD.

subtitles.original: I hope you guys enjoyed it! Yay!
subtitles.english: I hope you guys enjoyed it! Yay!

subtitles.original: Emang kayak Reine tuh suka banget gitu sama lagunya.
subtitles.english: Reine really likes the song.

subtitles.original: Jadi masih akan ada lebih banyak lagi.
subtitles.english: So there's still going to be more.

subtitles.original: There's gonna be way more more more more songs...
subtitles.english: There's gonna be way more more more more songs...

subtitles.original: ...and I'm sure there's a lot of guests.
subtitles.english: ...and I'm sure there's a lot of guests.

subtitles.original: I hope you guys are excited for them!
subtitles.english: I hope you guys are excited for them!

subtitles.original: これからもね、もっともっと熱くなるからね、ゲストも、many many many many...
subtitles.english: From now on, it's going to get hotter and hotter, and there'll be many many guests...
